services.title: Our Painting Services

process.title: Our Simple 3-Step Process
process.subtitle: We've streamlined our process to make your painting project as stress-free as possible.
process.step1Desc: Fill out the form below. We'll review your details and contact you within 24 hours.
process.step2Desc: We provide a transparent proposal with exact timelines, materials, and pricing. No guesswork.
process.step3Desc: Our team executes flawlessly, cleans up completely, and does a final walkthrough to ensure 100% satisfaction.

about.title: About Trisalex
about.subtitle: Family owned and operated for over 25 years, Trisalex has been the trusted name for professional painting in Montreal and the West Island.
about.description: We specialize in professional high-end interior painting and exterior spray painting for homes. We believe that proper preparation is the key to every successful project. That's why we don't just paint; we offer comprehensive drywall repairs and plastering before painting to ensure smooth surfaces and long-lasting, flawless results.
points: High-end interior and exterior spray painting

servicesPage.title: Our Professional Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Comprehensive painting and preparation services tailored to meet the highest standards of quality for your Montreal or West Island home.
servicesPage.requestQuote: Request a quote for this service

interior.title: Interior Painting
interior.description: Transform your living spaces with our high-end interior painting services. We handle everything from walls and ceilings to intricate trim and doors, using only premium quality paints for a flawless finish.

exterior.title: Exterior Spray Painting
exterior.description: Boost your home's curb appeal and protect it from the elements. Our exterior spray painting provides a smooth, durable, and weather-resistant finish for siding, brick, stucco, and more.

drywall.title: Drywall Repairs and Plastering
drywall.description: Proper preparation is key to a lasting paint job. We offer expert drywall repairs, patching, and plastering to ensure your surfaces are perfectly smooth before the first drop of paint is applied.

commercial.title: Commercial Painting
commercial.description: Professional painting services for businesses, offices, and retail spaces in Montreal. We work around your schedule to minimize disruption while delivering high-quality results.

staining.title: Staining and Refinishing
staining.description: Expert staining and refinishing for decks, fences, and wooden surfaces. We use high-quality stains that protect your wood and enhance its natural beauty.

portfolioPage.title: Before and After Projects
portfolioPage.subtitle: Browse the full gallery of recent Trisalex transformations across Montreal and the West Island, with the same before-and-after comparisons previously shown on the home page.

items.title: Interior Painting - Full Main Floor
items.text: Trisalex repainted our living room, kitchen, and hallway. The prep was meticulous, edges are perfectly clean, and they finished exactly on schedule.
items.author: Sarah M.

items.title: Exterior Spray Painting - Brick and Aluminum
items.text: We hired Trisalex for exterior spray painting on our brick facade and aluminum siding. The finish looks factory-smooth and the color came out exactly as promised.
items.author: Marc D.

items.title: Cabinet Painting - Kitchen Refresh
items.text: Our kitchen cabinets look brand new after Trisalex refinished them. The team protected everything, kept the space clean, and delivered a premium result.
items.author: Nadia R.

items.title: Interior Painting - Condo Turnover
items.text: I needed a fast repaint before listing my condo. Trisalex patched walls, painted ceilings and trim, and completed everything within three days.
items.author: Kevin L.

items.title: Exterior Spray Painting - Vinyl Siding
items.text: Trisalex transformed our faded vinyl siding and shutters. The crew was punctual, organized, and the curb appeal improvement is incredible.
items.author: Julie T.

items.title: Interior Painting - Staircase and Trim
items.text: We booked Trisalex for our staircase, railings, and trim. Communication was excellent throughout and the final finish is flawless.
items.author: Anthony G.

items.title: Commercial Painting - Boutique Space
items.text: Our boutique stayed open while Trisalex repainted the interior in phases. They were respectful with customers and delivered a clean, professional look.
items.author: Isabelle P.

items.title: Interior Painting - Basement and Ceiling
items.text: From drywall touch-ups to final coats, Trisalex handled our basement repaint professionally. The space is brighter and the workmanship is top quality.
items.author: Daniel C.
